text.title: Feature Prioritisation — RICE Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Feature Prioritisation — RICE end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: collect-items
step.action: List candidate features; cap at 20 for one batch.

step.name: score
step.action: Per item, estimate Reach, Impact, Confidence, Effort.

step.name: rank
step.action: Sort descending; flag confidence-floor / effort-ceiling violations.

step.name: record
step.action: Capture top-N as decision record with rationale.
